productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Big Cat Duffle Bag
description: Perfect for that weekend trip, this rugged Big cat duffel bag from puma is a great bag that can carry all your essentials when you head into the wilderness.MeasurementHeight: 32 cmWidth: 56 cmDepth: 28 cmMade of polyester Nylon bonded thread for durabilityBranded zippers and slidersOne zippered chamber for easy storageTwo-side zippered mesh compartments for enhanced spaceRemovable and adjustable long strap to convert it into a hand bag when not travellingShort padded handles with Velcro fastening for added comfort and carrying easeJumping Cat branding on the frontFour legs on the baseWash careDo not machine washRub surface with damp clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not bleach, line dry, iron or dry clean
